dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat} is spreading faster than anticipated. More people are showing symptoms, and the area around {location_hint} is getting worse.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says {quest_focus} has affected a dozen more since you started investigating. The {enemy_type} near {location_hint} are also behaving strangely: aggressive and uncoordinated, as if driven by the same force.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need {quest_item} from the affected zone and every hostile cleared from the path. {quest_stakes} worsen with every hour that passes.

playerResponses.text: I won't let it spread further.

dialogueChunks.intro: The afflicted have become dangerous. {quest_focus} drove them to violence, and they've attacked anyone who approaches the contaminated area near {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} says they're not in control of themselves: {quest_threat} has them in its grip. The {enemy_type} seem drawn to the same location, creating a chaotic mix of hostile forces. {quest_ally} insists we can still save {quest_stakes} if we act now.
dialogueChunks.outro: Push through the hostiles, gather what we need, and don't harm the afflicted unless you have no choice. They're victims, not enemies.

playerResponses.text: I'll do what I can to save them.

dialogueChunks.intro: You've traced {quest_threat} to its origin near {location_hint}. The source is worse than anyone expected: a site pulsing with corrupt energy that warps everything around it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} near the source have been twisted by prolonged exposure. {quest_ally} says neutralizing {quest_focus} requires specific materials gathered from the surrounding area. {target_npc} is preparing a countermeasure, but needs what only you can retrieve.
dialogueChunks.outro: Gather the materials and clear the corrupted {enemy_type} from around the source. {quest_stakes} hang on what you do next.
